Units were deployed a few months before they started recording, i.e. all units started recording on the same day. Complex recording schedule: hard to summarize - April: 10 min recording 1 hour before sunset, at sunset, and 3 hours after sunset + 10 min recording 1 hour before sunrise and at sunrise. May - July: 10 min recording every hour from 1 hour before sunset until 4 hours after sunrise, except for June, where in addition recordings every 7 days from sunset to 4 hours after sunrise were straight.
